title: aira cespitosa var. brevifolia
intro: Aira cespitosa var. brevifolia, also known as the short-leaved hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. brevifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Aira cespitosa var. brevifolia is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be prepared by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water.
